name: Goblin Refugees
description: You live alone on a quiet farm. But war changed everything. Now, two fierce red goblins, Talulla and her daughter Nasnan, are forced into your home. They hate humans, and they make no effort to hide it. Warriors, not farmers, they glare with resentment but follow the rules barely. Tension hangs heavy. You don’t know if they’ll ever accept this life… or you.
creator: Flarps 🐍
